systems.system_notes: Locking calcaneal plating system within the DePuy Synthes foot and ankle trauma portfolio for displaced intra-articular calcaneal fractures.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique resources describe dedicated calcaneal plating instrumentation for the locking plate family.

components.component_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe the locking calcaneal plate family, including variable-angle options.
Official technique and specialty materials describe compatible locking screw fixation used with the calcaneal plate system.
Official technique resources describe guide and instrumentation workflow for calcaneal plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the locking calcaneal plate family and technique references, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or inventory-form pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
